summary: Phase 12 Testing: UI Improvements - Green Logo, Language Selector, Stats 5I Column Removal, Calendar Convocation Features, Championship Matchday Field. All 6 features tested and verified working correctly via Playwright UI testing.

issues: Existing matches may not have matchday values set, so J1/J2 badges don't appear. New matches created with Jornada field will show badges correctly.

green_logo_login.description: Green transparent logo (logoVerdTransp.png) displays correctly on login page

green_logo_sidebar.description: Green transparent logo displays correctly in sidebar with theme adaptation (brightness filter for dark mode)

language_selector_login.description: Language selector dropdown on login page works correctly. Shows PT (Portuguese) and EN (English) options with flags. Switching languages updates UI text.

stats_no_5i_column.description: Stats page individual statistics table does NOT show 5I column. Columns present: N.º, Nome, G, AG, D, Pe, LD, and card columns (yellow, blue, red)

calendar_dropdown_menu.description: Calendar event cards show dropdown menu with all required options: Editar, Convocar Jogadores, Ver Estado Convocatória, Adiar, Cancelar, Eliminar

championship_matchday_field.description: Add Match dialog in Championship Detail page includes 'Jornada' field (number input). Field is properly labeled and functional.

matches_ordered_by_matchday.description: Frontend code sorts matches by matchday first, then by date. Matches without matchday are placed at end (matchday=999 fallback).
matches_ordered_by_matchday.note: Existing matches may not have matchday values set in database

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 12 UI improvements fully functional: 1) Green logo (logoVerdTransp.png) displays on login and sidebar with theme adaptation, 2) Language selector on login page switches between PT/EN, 3) Stats page removed 5I column - now shows N.º, Nome, G, AG, D, Pe, LD and cards, 4) Calendar dropdown menu has all convocation options (Editar, Convocar Jogadores, Ver Estado Convocatória), 5) Championship Add Match dialog has Jornada field, 6) Frontend sorts matches by matchday. Note: Existing matches may not have matchday values set.
